Plaintiff stipulates to the Judge Pro Tem deciding today's motion. Party present and court authorize the clerk to sign the Judge Pro Tem Stipulaiton on their behalf.

PLAINTIFF P.W. STEPHENS ENVIRONMENTAL, INC., Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Admission Helen Tan

Granted, no opposition filed. Stephens Environmental, Inc.'s counsel Morales Fierro & Reeves within 7 days. Counsel for plaintiff is to prepare and submit a proposed order to Judge Pro Tem Aaron Minnis at aaron@minnisandsmallets.com.
